title: Oracle K8s Cluster
description: Custom Kubernetes environment on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.
longDescription: The foundation for the new ecosystem. A fully functional K8s cluster providing scalable and cost-effective hosting.

title: Move to .NET
description: Migrating core services to .NET for improved performance and scalability.
longDescription: Transitioning the backend architecture to .NET to leverage its robust ecosystem and performance benefits.

title: Create Template Project
description: Standardizing project starts with a robust template.
longDescription: Building a reusable template that includes authentication, logging, and deployment configs to speed up new app development.

title: Local Continuous Deployment
longDescription: I've chosen to implement a local scripting approach for CD instead of complex CI pipelines. This allows for faster deployments and less overhead while working solo, while still providing automated and repeatable updates to the K8s cluster.

title: Dev Environment
description: Isolated staging and local development environments.
longDescription: Setting up a mirrored dev environment to test features safely before production rollout.

title: Per-App Newsletters
description: Targeted updates and subscription management for individual projects.
longDescription: Infrastructure to handle segmented email lists, allowing users to follow specific apps or the general ecosystem.

title: User Idea Submission
description: A transparent board for users to post and vote on new app features or project ideas.
longDescription: Closing the feedback loop by allowing the community to directly influence the nursery roadmap and prioritize new builds.

title: Sprint Status History
description: Indicate changes in task status between sprints on the website.
longDescription: Implement a feature on the website to visualize how tasks move between statuses across sprints, providing historical context and progress tracking.

title: Newsletter-to-Beta Automation
description: Automated public beta onboarding via newsletter signup.
longDescription: Mechanism where users signing up to the newsletter are automatically added to iOS/Android beta groups via App Store Connect and Play Store APIs.
